SyncPlan.title: Synced Travel Plan
SyncPlan.description: A trip plan shared or loaded across multiple devices with a short code

id.description: Unique auto-generated ID for the plan

tripPlan.description: The complete itinerary data payload containing days, budgets, POIs and transits

peers.description: The list of currently active devices collaborating on this travel plan

notes.description: An array of collaborative checklist notes and trip remarks

history.description: The changelog ledger tracing edit steps of active connected devices

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp representing the last save

ForumPost.title: Community Travel Plan Post
ForumPost.description: A shared tourist spotlight route or experience published to the global itinerary forum

title.description: Visual title of the travel recommendation

description.description: Detailed text write-up summarizing travel highlights

tags.description: A list of theme tags indexing this travel report

author.description: Display name of the tourist path author

upvotes.description: Total upvote counts collected from the community

createdAt.description: The date-time when the post was compiled

comments.description: An array containing discussion replies from travelers

/sync_plans/{planId}.description: Collection storing shared real-time travel itineraries

/forum_posts/{postId}.description: Collection storing community recommendations and public itineraries
